title: vat account GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of a single vat account.

account.description: The account for this vat account.

accountNumber.description: A unique identifier of the account.

self.description: A unique link reference to the account item.

contraAccount.description: The contra account for this vat account.

accountNumber.description: A unique identifier of the contra account.

self.description: A unique link reference to the contra account item.

vatType.description: The vat type for this vat account.

vatTypeNumber.description: A unique identifier of the vat type.

self.description: A unique link reference to the vat type item.

barred.description: If true this vat account has been barred from further use.

name.description: The name of the vat account.

ratePercentage.description: The tax rate for this vat account.

vatCode.description: The alphanumerical code for the vat account.

self.description: A unique link reference to the vat account item.
